hero.subtitle: Swap books with readers in your neighborhood. List your finished reads, discover new stories nearby, and meet fellow book lovers — all for free.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.warning: This will permanently delete your account, all your book listings, exchange history, and messages. This cannot be undone.
delete.gracePeriod: You will have 30 days to cancel before your data is permanently anonymized.
delete.error: Failed to delete account. Please check your password and try again.

public.deactivated: This user is no longer active.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.deleteDescription: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. You will have a 30-day grace period to cancel.
